title: Feedback
description: Mojang didn't listen, so we did for them!
body:
# What's Feedack?
A Modpack (obviously) but what exactly does it do? Well, Mojang sometimes ignores or thinks differently then most Minecraft Players and don't always add what they want... So we did it for them!

![Feedback (Made by I'am best)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/484b21527d97db7868301bdd5e0712f0078dcb1e_0.webp)
# Frequently asked Questions:
> **Q:** What Feedback has been added?                                                     
> **A:** A List of Mods and Features is coming soon!

> **Q:** Where did you find the Feedback?                                                     
> **A:** Most Features are based of the [official Minecraft Feedback Website](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us) and some from you guys or by us!

> **Q:** What Loader does this Modpack use?                                                                   
> **A:** [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), it should install itself after you downloaded this Modpack, so no need to take any extra steps!

> **Q:** Where can I report or suggest something?                                                
> **A:** Currently you can do this in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/gGrAw5WtNb), but we plan on being on Github soon!
           
> **Q:** Do I need this modpack on my server for it to work?                                                     
> **A:** Yep, for it to work you need to put it on your Server and Client!

> **Q:** How can I contribute?                                                                             
> **A:** We suggest contributing the Mod Creators instead, but if you want to contribute this Modpack you can do it on our [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/iam_best/membership) or on our [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/iam_best)!

> **Q:** Where can I ask for more help or talk with the Creators?                                                                             
> **A:** You can email us at madebyiambest@gmail.com or [join our Discord](https://discord.gg/gGrAw5WtNb) to talk with me and our awesome Community!

# How to install?
[![Modrinth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50f2eaa6263492cc65f49ef84a31e7d9fb51179c.png)](https://modrinth.com)
1. Open [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app) or install it!
2. Login with your Microsoft account!
3. Select "Browse" on the left side!
4. Search "Feedback" and select the first result!
5. Download and install the Modpack, it's that easy... You can hit play now!

Alternatively you can use this Link: https://modrinth.com/modpack/feedbackmc
